response:
[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Project Helios — Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\n**Compound:** NXB-7042  \n**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  \n**Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \n**Last updated:** 2026-03-28\n\n## Patient-level dosing summary\n\n| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Clinical Note |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well; weight gain improving |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27 |\n\n## Quick PK stability note\n\nBased on the latest dosing configuration and embedded patient notes:\n\n- **CU-001:** Appears stable on current regimen, with documented tumor regression.\n- **CU-002:** Appears stable/improving, with positive response and weight gain.\n- **CU-003:** No instability noted in the file, but this is a **new enrollment**, so trend stability is still too early to fully assess.\n\nNo explicit dose-adjustment alerts or toxicity flags are recorded in the current dosing config.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

### Dosing summary
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated total dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| **CU-001** | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| **CU-002** | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| **CU-003** | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

### Clinical notes
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan.
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving.
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27.

### PK stability
Based on the latest dosing config and notes, **nothing in the file suggests an immediate PK stability issue**:
- **CU-001** and **CU-002** look stable to improving on current regimens.
- **CU-003** has no flagged issue, but it’s **too early to call trend stability** since this is a recent enrollment.

I’ve also saved this as a report for Dr. Martinez. If you want, I can format it into a short email once you give me their Nexus address.
thinking:
